title: Crispy Spanish Baby Squid Croquettes
description: A romantic Spanish dish featuring crispy baby squid, perfect for a special occasion. This dairy-free-friendly recipe combines citrusy flavors with a crunchy exterior and tender interior.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the chopped baby squid, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, onion, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the chickpea flour and water until smooth.
Add the chickpea flour mixture to the squid mixture and stir until just combined. Be careful not to overmix.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter and 1/2 inch thick.
Heat about 1/2 inch of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until it reaches 350°F.
Carefully place the patties in the hot oil and fry for about 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the croquettes from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
Serve the croquettes hot, garnished with lemon wedges and chopped fresh parsley if desired.
